parameters.jsCode:
const { clientName, summary, campaigns, topAds } = items[0].json; // ===== PERÍODO ===== const today = new Date(); const end = new Date(); end.setDate(today.getDate() - 1); const start = new Date(); start.setDate(today.getDate() - 7); const format = (d) => d.toLocaleDateString('pt-BR', { day: '2-digit', month: '2-digit' }); const period = `${format(start)} - ${format(end)}`; // ===== HELPERS ===== const safe = (v) => Number(v) || 0; const money = (v) => `R$ ${safe(v).toFixed(2)}`; const pct = (v) => `${(safe(v) * 100).toFixed(2)}%`; let html = `

Relatório de Performance

${clientName}
Período: ${period}

Resumo

Investimento: ${money(summary.spend)} Cliques: ${summary.clicks}
Conversões: ${summary.conversions} CTR: ${pct(summary.ctr)}
CPC: ${money(summary.cpc)} CPA: ${summary.conversions > 0 ? money(summary.cpa) : '-'}

Campanhas

`; campaigns.forEach(c => { html += `
${c.name} (${c.source})
Investimento: ${money(c.spend)} | Cliques: ${c.clicks} | Conversões: ${c.conversions} | CTR: ${pct(c.ctr)} | CPA: ${c.conversions > 0 ? money(c.cpa) : '-'}
`; }); html += `

Top Criativos (Meta Ads)

`; topAds.forEach(ad => { html += ` `; }); html += `


${ad.ad_name}
${money(ad.spend)}
${ad.clicks} cliques
${ad.conversions} conv
${pct(ad.ctr)}
`; return [{ json: { html } }];
